name: DeepSeek GEO Collector MVP

statuses.manual_required: 登录/验证/风控，需要人工处理

main_flow: Open workbook and read used range from Tasks.
For each row: continue only when status is pending, platform is deepseek, and question is not empty.
Before running, write status=running, remark=正在采集, updated_at=current time.
Call RunDeepSeek with current row values.
Write returned status, screenshot_path, answer_text_path, remark, updated_at back to the same row.
Wait 90 seconds before moving to the next row.
run_deepseek_flow: Create output directory for current date.
Open real Chrome and navigate to https://chat.deepseek.com/.
Get page text and check manual_takeover_markers.
If markers are found, save screenshot and return manual_required.
Wait until Stop Generating disappears; fallback fixed wait is 90 seconds.
Try to collect the latest answer text and save it.
failure_rules: On any exception, save screenshot when possible.
Write status=failed unless the page is login, verification, or security review; those cases use manual_required.
Put the failing stage name in remark.
